title: go Runtime Capabilities v1
description: Capability matrix reported by a WorkerAdapter at startup. Scheduler reads capabilities; packet shape is unchanged.

supports_foreground_parallel.description: Multiple subagents can run concurrently; parent waits for all.

supports_background_parallel.description: Subagents can run async while parent continues. ZCode: false in v1.

supports_worktree_cwd_binding.description: Adapter can honor workspace.root as the sole write target.

supports_structured_handoff.description: Adapter can emit handoff JSON matching handoff-protocol.md.
